meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Ryan Garage Door is a fully-insured, family-run mobile garage door company serving Huntley, IL since {founded}. Meet the team behind {reviewsTotal}+ five-star reviews.

header.title: About Ryan Garage Door
header.subtitle: A fully-insured, owner-operated mobile garage door company serving Huntley, IL and the NW suburbs since {founded}.

intro.heading: The pro your neighbors recommend
paragraphs: Ryan Garage Door started with a simple idea: homeowners deserve garage door service that’s fast, honest, and fairly priced — without the runaround or the upsell. Years and hundreds of jobs later, that’s still exactly how we work.

We’re a small, owner-operated team led by Ryan, alongside skilled technicians like Badru, Muwonge and Moush. Because we’re mobile, we come to you — anywhere within about {radius} miles of Huntley — with the parts and tools to get most jobs done on the spot, often the same day you call.

From a snapped spring at 2 a.m. to a beautiful new insulated door, we handle it all with the same care: diagnose honestly, quote up front, fix it right, and make sure it’s safe before we leave. That approach has earned us {reviewsTotal}+ five-star reviews across Google, Thumbtack, Angi and Nextdoor — every single one, five stars.
We’re fully insured and BBB-accredited, and we carry and service the brands you know — LiftMaster, Chamberlain and Genie — including Wi-Fi smart openers you can control from your phone.

image.alt: Ryan Garage Door technician adjusting a garage door

stat.text: of hands-on garage door experience serving the Huntley area

items.d: We tell you what’s actually wrong and what it’ll cost — before we start. No invented problems, no pressure.
We give a time window, communicate if we’re running late, and get the job done right the first time.
Customers tell us again and again that we beat the big competitors’ quotes without cutting corners.
Insured, careful, and tidy — we clean up and leave your garage better than we found it.

cta.title: Ready to work with a team you can trust?
